name: switchyard
description: Shared provider runtime for AI apps.

scripts.gate:pr: pnpm run check:host-safety && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.gate:nightly:expensive: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:docs-frontdoor && pnpm run test:coverage && pnpm run build && pnpm run test:mutation:baseline
scripts.test:unit: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --project contracts --project kernel --project credentials --project diagnostics --project lane-byok --project lanes-web --project sdk --project surface-sdk-client --project surface-mcp --project consumer-compat
scripts.test:mcp:smoke: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --project surface-mcp
scripts.test:examples: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --project builder-starters
scripts.test:starter-packs: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --project starter-packs
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter @switchyard/auth-portal --filter @switchyard/surface-http -r test:integration && pnpm run test:examples && pnpm run test:starter-packs
scripts.test:docs-frontdoor: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --project docs-frontdoor
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration && pnpm run test:e2e && pnpm run test:docs-frontdoor
scripts.test:coverage:raw: pnpm exec vitest --clearCache && rm -rf coverage && mkdir -p coverage/.tmp && pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit tests/integration tests/e2e --cache=false --no-file-parallelism --maxWorkers=1 --config vitest.config.ts --coverage.enabled true --coverage.clean=false --coverage.processingConcurrency=1 --coverage.reporter=text-summary --coverage.reporter=json-summary --coverage.reportsDirectory=coverage
scripts.test:coverage:html: pnpm exec vitest --clearCache && rm -rf coverage && mkdir -p coverage/.tmp && pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit tests/integration tests/e2e --cache=false --no-file-parallelism --maxWorkers=1 --config vitest.config.ts --coverage.enabled true --coverage.clean=false --coverage.processingConcurrency=1 --coverage.reporter=html --coverage.reportsDirectory=coverage
scripts.hook:pre-commit: node scripts/check-sensitive-material.mjs && pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/web/runtime-request-url.test.ts tests/unit/web/url-hosts.test.ts tests/unit/web/browser-session-coherence.test.ts tests/integration/docs/sensitive-surface-hygiene.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts
